भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उप-खंड (ii) तारीख 25 िसत瀓बर, 2000 म犆 灹कािशत भारत सरकार के सामािजक 瀈याय और अिधका琇रता मं灴ालय क琉 अिधसूचना का.आ. सं榐यांक 881(अ), तारीख 22 िसत瀓बर, 2000 का िन玈िलिखत और संशोधन करती है, अथा榁त् :— उ猴 अिधसूचना म犆, 灙म सं榐यांक 5 से 7 और उससे संबंिधत 灹िवि玗य犘 के 瀡थान पर िन玈िलिखत रखा जाएगा, अथा榁त् :— ''5 炈ी एम.जी. 灹काश सद瀡य कना榁टक पेरे瀈टस एसोिसएशन (िवकलांगजन अिभभावक फार मे瀈टली 琇रटा榁डेट िस琇टजंस प琇रसंघ से 灹ितिनिध-मानिसक बंगलु牱, कना榁टक मंदता) 6. सु炈ी इं灶ाणी बसु, सद瀡य ए榉शन पार आ琇ट榖म (िवकलांगजन अिभभावक साऊथ 琈द瀖ली (琈द瀖ली) प琇रसंघ से 灹ितिनिध-मानिसक मंदता) 7. 炈ी उपे瀈灶 जोशी, सद瀡य 瀡वीकार एसोिशएशन आफ (िवकलांगजन अिभभावक पेरे瀈टस आफ मे瀈टली प琇रसंघ से 灹ितिनिध-मानिसक 琇रटा榁डड िच瀖灱न, नागपुर मंदता)।'' [सं. 26-3/2013-डीडी-3] अवनीश कुमार अव瀡थी, संयु榉त सिचव 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण 琇ट瀉पण : मूल अिधिनयम भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग-II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) म犆 का.आ. सं榐यांक 3881(अ) तारीख 22 िसत瀓बर, 2000 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी और अिधसूचना सं榐यांक का.आ. 1734(अ) तारीख 20 जुलाई, 2011 獧ारा अंितम संशोधन 琈कया गया। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT (Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th January, 2016 S.O. 90(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (4) of section 3 of the National Trust for Welfare of Persons with Autism, Cerebral Palsy, Mental Retardation and Multiple Disabilities Act, 1999 (44 of 1999), the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment number S.O. 881(E) dated the 22nd September, 2000 published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, section 3, sub-section (ii) dated the 25th September, 2000, namely:— In the said notification, for serial numbers 5 to 7 and the entries relating thereto, the following shall be substituted, namely:— “5 Shri M.G. Prakash, Karnataka Parents’ Association For Mentally Retarded Citizens, Bangalore (Karnataka) Member (Representative from association of parents of persons with disability – Mental retardation) 6. Ms. Indrani Basu, Action for Autism, South Delhi (Delhi) Member (Representative from association of parents of persons with disability – Autism) 7. Shri Anil Upendra Joshi, Sweekar Association of Parents of Mentally Retarded Children, Nagpur (Maharashtra) Member (Representative from association of parents of persons with disability – Multiple Disability).” [No. 26-3/2013-DD-III] AWANISH K. AWASTHI, Jt. Secy. Note :The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, section 3, sub-section (ii) vide number S.O. 881(E) dated the 22nd September, 2000 and lastly amended vide notification number S.O. 1734 (E) dated the 20th July, 2011. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
